positive: A detailed, vintage botanical illustration of a celestial foxglove and moonflowers, drawn with fine cross-hatching ink lines on aged parchment. Style of Victorian scientific sketch, deep emerald green and muted gold accents. Highly intricate, naturalistic, cross-section view, clean linework, engraving style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, graffiti, modern colors
